title: Post-Season Begins
text: The season has ended, but we will continue to meet on Mondays after school for outreach, sponsors, and team building and learning.

title: Truckee Maker Show
text: Join us at the Truckee Maker Show at the Truckee Community Center from 11 AM to 5 PM.

title: Recruiting New Members for 2026–27
text: Interested in robotics, engineering, or software? We're looking for motivated students to join the team for next season. No experience needed.
